contract.payment_cadence: milestone-based / task order level; FFP per unit for platforms; T&M for NRE labor per task order
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms (675 units total across 5 ordering periods at escalating unit prices: $18,000 to $20,655)
Mission Days Operational Support (150 days total @ $2,850/day) + Operational and Testing Support (30 sessions @ $6,000)
Training sessions: Operator/Observer (5 sessions @ $6,000) + Instructor Training (5 sessions @ $600)
Travel for Operational Support (5 ordering periods × $50,000 NTE per period, FTR-compliant per Section 5.3)
Course Development: Operator/Observer and Instructor Training (5 periods × $12,000 per period)
Non-Recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation, Modeling, and NHC workflow integration (5 periods × $198,000 per period, all NTE line items)
